name: fast-playwright
description: FastMCP Playwright server wrapper for interactive, session-based browser automation.
capability_summary: Provides persistent browser sessions with accessibility snapshots and high-speed interaction tools for navigation, click/type actions, screenshots, and network inspection.

parameters.name: mcp_command
parameters.description: MCP tool to invoke (browser_navigate, browser_click, browser_type, browser_screenshot, browser_network_requests).

parameters.name: arguments
parameters.description: JSON-serialized arguments forwarded to the selected MCP tool.

mcp_tools.name: browser_navigate
mcp_tools.description: Navigate to a URL within the persistent browser session.

mcp_tools.name: browser_click
mcp_tools.description: Click an element using role/text/selector-driven targeting.

mcp_tools.name: browser_type
mcp_tools.description: Type text into an input/field with session-aware targeting.

mcp_tools.name: browser_screenshot
mcp_tools.description: Capture a visual snapshot of page or element state.

mcp_tools.name: browser_network_requests
mcp_tools.description: Inspect network requests observed during session execution.
